title: Input trigger abstraction for mouse and external devices
created_from: User request to support non-keyboard dictation triggers such as mouse gestures while preserving current keyboard behavior

follow_ups.title: User-facing trigger configuration UI
follow_ups.reason: The trigger abstraction should support configuration, but the exact menu/settings UI is separate from the runtime contract.

follow_ups.title: External device trigger plugin surface
follow_ups.reason: Future devices beyond keyboard and mouse may need a stable adapter boundary after the first mouse path is validated.
